context.audience: Frontend and full-stack developers building component-driven UIs, enterprise teams maintaining large React codebases, bootcamp graduates entering the job market with React skills
pain_points: State management choices and trade-offs between Context, Redux, Zustand, and Jotai
React Server Components adoption and mental model shift
Performance optimization with memo, useMemo, useCallback, and React Compiler
Testing component behavior with React Testing Library and integration tests
Managing complex forms with validation, error handling, and accessibility
monetization: Component library and design system sales
content_that_works: Component pattern guides and best practices
